name: Lemon Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and lemon flavoring until well mixed.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined (do not overmix).
4. Heat oil in a deep frying pan or pot to 350°F (175°C).
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil using a piping bag or small spoon, forming small puffs.
6. Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy on all sides (about 2-3 minutes per side).
7. Remove the fritters with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. For the dressing: In a saucepan over medium heat, combine sugar, butter, and flour. Stir constantly until the mixture is smooth and thickens.
9. Add water gradually while stirring to form a glossy sauce. Cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
10. Pour the warm sauce evenly over the hot fritters and serve immediately.
